---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement.
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What's the problem this solves?
<!-- Concrete use case, not a generic wish. -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- How would you imagine it working in the UI / API? -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why they're worse. -->

## Scope check
- [ ] Fits the local-first / self-host design
- [ ] Doesn't require new paid services or vendor lock-in
- [ ] Reasonable to maintain — not a feature for a single niche
